name: Eastern Bank
description_short: Eastern Bank is a full-service bank offering personal and business banking products including checking, savings, CDs, mortgages, and SBA lending with strong local market presence.
description_long:
Eastern Bank is an established financial institution operating as a traditional community bank with a focus on personal and business banking services. The bank recently expanded through the acquisition of HarborOne Bank customers, indicating growth and consolidation within the regional banking market.

The bank offers a comprehensive range of deposit products including checking accounts (Eastern Free Checking with no minimum balance or monthly fees), savings accounts, and certificates of deposit (CDs). They provide personal lending through home equity lines of credit (HELOCs) currently advertised at 6.24% APR, mortgage lending services, and credit card products. For business customers, Eastern Bank provides small business banking, SBA lending, treasury services, and digital banking solutions.

Eastern Bank distinguishes itself through its #1 SBA Lender ranking in Massachusetts for sixteen consecutive years, indicating specialized expertise in small business lending. The bank emphasizes local, experienced lenders for mortgage services and positions itself as a one-stop shop for both personal and business banking needs. Current promotional offerings include up to $750 cash bonuses for opening new checking or savings accounts.

As a traditional bank, Eastern Bank operates through both physical branches (implied by references to local lending) and digital channels including mobile banking, online banking, and business digital banking platforms. However, the website content provided does not reveal information about fees for certain services, deposit insurance details, or comprehensive interest rate information beyond current promotional rates.
services: Credit cards for personal and business use
pros: #1 SBA Lender in Massachusetts for 16 consecutive years, indicating strong small business lending expertise
Eastern Free Checking account with no minimum balance and no monthly fees
Current promotional HELOC rate of 6.24% APR (Prime minus 0.51%)
Up to $750 cash bonuses for opening new checking or savings accounts
4-Month Featured CD at 3.95% Annual Percentage Yield
Comprehensive digital banking options including mobile app and online banking
Serves both personal and business customers with integrated account management
cons: Website lacks transparent fee schedule for overdrafts, transfers, or other services
Limited information about interest rates for standard savings accounts and checking products outside promotional periods
No details provided about customer service availability or branch locations
Recent acquisition of HarborOne customers may create operational transition challenges
Mortgage and lending products appear to require application and underwriting rather than instant approval
best_for: Small business owners seeking SBA loans and business banking solutions
Homeowners interested in mortgage lending or home equity lines of credit
Individuals seeking no-fee checking accounts with digital banking access
Customers wanting consolidated personal and business banking with one institution
diagnosis: Eastern Bank is best suited for small business owners needing SBA lending and homeowners seeking mortgage services, as well as individuals wanting straightforward banking products without account minimums. The main caveat is that as a traditional bank, approval processes require underwriting and applications rather than instant funding, and key fee and rate information is not fully transparent on the website.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
